title: Keeping Trump in NATO is Rutte’s only mission, former Sec Gen says
summary_full: Rutte believes that in the history books, what will matter isn’t whether he called Trump ‘Daddy’ but that the alliance is still standing, Minuto-Rizzo told Euractiv
summary_public: Rutte believes that in the history books, what will matter isn’t whether he called Trump ‘Daddy’ but that the alliance is still standing, Minuto-Rizzo told Euractiv
